slots.caption_ig:
Where do you actually live? The 6 blocks around you have ~15 restaurants. ForkFox tells you which dish at which block-radius restaurant is actually worth your walk. The map is opinionated.

#ForkFox #PhillyEats #BayAreaEats #FoodSmart #DishNotRestaurant
slots.caption_fb: Most food apps assume you'll travel. ForkFox assumes you live somewhere specific. The 6 blocks around your apartment have 15 restaurants. We tell you which dish at which one of those is actually worth walking to — not because it's the best in the city, but because it's the best within walking distance.
slots.image_gen_prompt: Dark-mode neighborhood map with a 6-block radius circle. 15 restaurant dots inside, one highlighted red. Editorial graphic. 1080x1080.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16, 8s. Animation zooms from city-wide map to a single 6-block neighborhood. Radius circle draws around 'YOU'. Pins illuminate. Best one glows red. Text: 'Within walking distance.'
